verification_instructions: 1. Run flutter pub get in frontend/ to verify dependencies resolve. 2. Run flutter analyze to check for issues. 3. Verify folder structure exists.
setup_instructions: 1. Install Flutter SDK (latest stable) via git clone. 2. Add flutter/bin to PATH. 3. Run flutter create with specified org and name. 4. Update pubspec.yaml with dependencies.
environment_constraints: Flutter SDK not pre-installed - must install from git. Java 25 available. Network mode is OPEN_INTERNET so all package installs are possible. Amazon Linux 2023 x86_64.
contribution_requirements: Work on feature/project-setup branch. Do not merge to main. Commit all changes when done.
key_patterns: Greenfield project - no existing patterns. Using Riverpod for state management, GoRouter for navigation, Dio for HTTP.
directory_structure: Currently only README.md at root. Will create frontend/ directory with full Flutter project.
